programme.desc: When a DNA test helps a young woman identify her birth parents, she discovers that some family histories are better left untold. Thriller, starring Allison Paige(n)

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler gets on more intimate terms with Joey's girlfriend, and Ross's love life improves - until his latest conquest reveals a grubby secret. Comedy, starring David Schwimmer, Matt LeBlanc and Matthew Perry(n)

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler is racked with guilt for kissing Joey's girlfriend and embarks on a wild spending spree in a misguided effort to keep his pal from discovering the truth. Meanwhile, Phoebe proves to be the only one who appreciates Ross's dubious keyboard talents(n)

programme.title: 5 News at 5
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world(n)

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Finn goes to confront his father, revealing that he is in possession of facts which Trent would prefer to remain a secret. Paul is delighted for Lucy over Mark's marriage proposal(n)

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Alf suggests a vigil to let the community pay their respects to the departed. As everyone gathers by candlelight, Alf asks Martha how she would feel about marrying him again(n)

programme.title: 5 News Tonight
programme.desc: A round-up of the evening's headlines, including coverage of the latest national and international stories(n)

programme.title: Wild Britain
programme.desc: Revealing the hidden lives of the familiar and the more unusual animals in the United Kingdom. Cameras follow barn owls as they hunt for small mammals through the British countryside, and a heath potter wasp builds an intricate clay pot for her young, captured in its entirety for the very first time. Plus, the farmers doing what they can to help our countryside creatures(n)

programme.title: Are They a Con?
programme.desc: Paul Connolly and Jean Johansson investigate whether councils and the big-name supermarkets are as environmentally friendly as they claim. Paul meets a family of keen recyclers from Derbyshire whose efforts to be green may unwittingly mean their recycled waste is ending up on a landfill. The team places a tracking device inside some waste to follow exactly where the councils are sending it - and the results prove shocking. Meanwhile, Jean checks out some of the bugs that may be lurking inside the environmentally friendly water bottles people are being advised to use(n)

programme.title: Elizabeth I and II: Britain's Golden Queens
programme.desc: The concluding episode examines the importance of two women who enter the two Queen's lives; Mary, Queen of Scots and Diana, Princess of Wales. When these two young women join the Royal circle, they are expected to be great additions to the court, but in both cases, it starts to become clear that Mary and Diana's enormous popularity, beauty and sparkle are in sharp contrast to the duty-bound queens(n)

programme.title: Inside
programme.desc: Documentary examining the most famous and feared criminal court in the land, and some of the cases that have been tried there, including Doctor Crippen and John Christie. The history of the building itself is also assessed, from the creation of the first Old Bailey in 1539 to its iconic facelift in 1907(n)

programme.title: Ian Huntley: Soham Murders Revisited
programme.desc: Documentary examining events that took place in the small Cambridgeshire town which horrified the country. In December 2003, Ian Huntley, a caretaker at Soham Village College, was convicted of two murders and jailed for life. This film looks at the search for his victims, Huntley's arrest, and his subsequent trial and conviction(n)

programme.title: BSL Zone
programme.desc: Billy Clinton and his dad, Jack are UFO spotters but when Billy sees himself on a TV documentary he's shocked. Billy realises it's time to really find life out there(n)

programme.title: Millions Like Us (1943)
programme.desc: A woman is happy to be called up for service during the Second World War, but disappointed to learn she will be working in a factory making aircraft parts. However, the new job brings romance in the shape of a handsome airman and a close circle of friends in her co-workers, who all rally round when tragedy strikes. Drama, starring Patricia Roc, Eric Portman, Gordon Jackson and Basil Radford(n)

programme.title: The Longest Day (1962)
programme.desc: Fact-based Second World War drama chronicling the planning and execution of the Allied landings in Normandy on June 6, 1944, from the differing perspectives of the British, German, French and American forces. Starring Richard Burton, Richard Todd, Kenneth More, Sean Connery, John Wayne, Robert Mitchum, Henry Fonda, Curt Jurgens, Roddy McDowall and Rod Steiger(n)

programme.title: The Thirty-Nine Steps (1978)
programme.desc: An innocent man is informed of a devious plan to start the First World War by murdering a foreign minister. Almost immediately, he is framed for murder and embarks on a perilous cross-country trek to prove his innocence, pursued by both the police and ruthless spies. Thriller - the third film adaptation of John Buchan's novel - starring Robert Powell, Karen Dotrice, John Mills and George Baker(n)

programme.title: Now You See Me (2013)
programme.desc: Four magicians use their lavish stage shows as cover for a series of seemingly impossible heists, and give away the money they steal to their audiences. An FBI agent assembles a team of experts to discover how the baffling robberies are committed and what the secret agenda behind the crime spree is. Crime thriller, starring Jesse Eisenberg, Mark Ruffalo, Woody Harrelson and Isla Fisher(n)

programme.title: Taken (2008)
programme.desc: An American teenager travelling through Europe is abducted by a gang of sex traffickers. However, what the kidnappers do not realise is that the girl's father is a former CIA agent, who employs all his old skills as he searches for the criminals and tries to rescue his daughter. Thriller, starring Liam Neeson, Famke Janssen and Maggie Grace(n)

programme.title: Anthropoid (2016)
programme.desc: Second World War drama based on the true story of Operation Anthropoid, the mission to assassinate SS general Reinhard Heydrich, the main architect behind the Final Solution and the Reich's third in command after Hitler and Himmler. Starring Jamie Dornan and Cillian Murphy(n)

programme.title: The Bling Ring (2013)
programme.desc: Five teenagers united by an obsession with celebrity steal from the houses of the rich and famous stars they idolise, using the internet to follow their targets' movements. When the police finally catch up with them, the arrest brings a taste of the fame they have craved. Fact-based drama, starring Emma Watson and Israel Broussard(n)

programme.title: The Gentle Sex (1943)
programme.desc: Seven women from vastly different backgrounds are brought together as volunteers in the Auxiliary Territorial Service during the Second World War. Despite their differences they become firm friends during training and on assignment driving military transport and operating anti-aircraft guns. Drama, starring Rosamund John, Joan Greenwood, Lilli Palmer, John Justin and Joan Gates(n)

programme.title: The Tin Star (1957)
programme.desc: A world-weary bounty hunter, formerly a sheriff, arrives in a small town where a newly-appointed lawman is struggling to keep the peace. When he learns of the mercenary's past, the inexperienced lawman seeks his help in learning the tricks of the trade so he can bring an outlaw gang to justice. Anthony Mann's Western, starring Henry Fonda, Anthony Perkins, Lee Van Cleef, Betsy Palmer and Michel Ray(n)

programme.title: Kidnapped (1971)
programme.desc: A naive young man is cheated out of his inheritance by his conniving uncle, who sells him to the captain of a slave ship. On board he forms an alliance with a hardened rebel, and the pair make their escape when the ship is wrecked on the Scottish coast. Period adventure based on Robert Louis Stevenson's novel set during the Jacobite Uprising, with Michael Caine, Lawrence Douglas, Trevor Howard, Jack Hawkins and Donald Pleasence(n)

programme.title: Campbell's Kingdom (1957)
programme.desc: A man who has only six months to live returns to the land his family owns in the Canadian Rockies. He intends to prove his grandfather's frequently derided theory that there is oil to be found there, but he has little time to find it, as the area will be flooded when construction is completed on a nearby dam. Adventure, with Dirk Bogarde, Stanley Baker, Michael Craig and Barbara Murray(n)

programme.title: Behind Enemy Lines (2001)
programme.desc: A reconnaissance pilot is shot down and becomes stranded in enemy territory after filming evidence of a genocidal massacre by Serb militia in Bosnia. The naval air commander for Nato forces in the Balkans defies orders by mounting an unauthorised mission to rescue him, while the airman faces a battle to stay alive as he is pursued by paramilitary forces. Bosnian War drama, starring Gene Hackman, Owen Wilson, Gabriel Macht and Olek Krupa(n)

programme.title: Taken 2 (2012)
programme.desc: Former CIA agent Bryan Mills and his ex-wife Lenore are taken hostage in Istanbul by an Albanian gangster, whose son Bryan killed while bringing down a kidnapping ring. He is able to escape with the aid of his daughter, and together they fight to rescue Lenore and wipe out the criminal family. Action thriller sequel, starring Liam Neeson, Maggie Grace and Famke Janssen(n)

programme.title: American Assassin (2017)
programme.desc: After Mitch Rapp's girlfriend Katrina accepts his wedding proposal during an idyllic European beach holiday, they and many others are gunned down by terrorists. Mitch survives and becomes a master of unarmed combat before the US government consider using him for black ops. Action thriller, starring Dylan O'Brien, Michael Keaton and Sanaa Lathan(n)

programme.title: The East (2013)
programme.desc: A former FBI agent working for a private security firm is sent to infiltrate an anarchist movement behind a series of actions against corrupt corporations. She joins them in their acts of sabotage, but finds her loyalties changing as she forms connections with members of the group. Thriller, starring Brit Marling, Ellen Page and Alexander Skarsgard(n)

programme.title: Waterloo Road (1944)
programme.desc: A soldier serving in the Second World War discovers his wife has betrayed him by having an affair with a petty crook, so he resolves to settle matters and deserts from the army. He returns to a Blitz-ravaged London to confront his rival, but his quest for retribution is interrupted by an air raid. Drama, starring John Mills, Joy Shelton, Alastair Sim and Stewart Granger(n)

programme.title: A Night to Remember (1958)
programme.desc: Fact-based drama recreating the sinking of the Titanic, told from the point of view of the ship's second officer as he struggles to get as many passengers and crew off the vessel before it sinks. Meanwhile, the captain of a nearby vessel embarks on a doomed rescue mission. Starring Kenneth More, Honor Blackman, Ronald Allen, Tucker McGuire and David McCallum(n)

programme.title: Tulsa (1949)
programme.desc: A cattle magnate's ambitious daughter alienates her friends with her single-minded pursuit of wealth as she attempts to fend off the unwanted attentions of greedy oil barons intent on stealing her land. Drama, starring Susan Hayward, Robert Preston, Pedro Armendariz and Lloyd Gough(n)

programme.title: The Bravados (1958)
programme.desc: A widower visits a town where the men he believes murdered his wife are about to be hanged. When they escape from jail, he takes the law into his own hands and decides to hunt down and kill the fugitives. But over time, he begins to question whether his actions are right. Western, starring Gregory Peck, Joan Collins and Stephen Boyd(n)

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Joneses (2016)
programme.desc: A suburban couple become embroiled in an international espionage plot when they discover that their seemingly perfect new neighbours are actually government spies. Action comedy, starring Zach Galifianakis, Isla Fisher, Jon Hamm and Gal Gadot(n)

programme.title: Little Fockers (2010)
programme.desc: Nurse Greg is now the proud father of twins, but has yet to earn the respect of his wife's stern father after 10 years of marriage. The couple invite both sides of their extended family to the kids' birthday party, where Greg makes a desperate effort to finally prove his worth to his father-in-law. Comedy sequel, with Ben Stiller, Robert De Niro, Owen Wilson and Dustin Hoffman(n)

programme.title: Mr & Mrs Smith (2005)
programme.desc: An outwardly bored suburban couple lead double lives as professional assassins, both unaware of their partner's secret. When they are hired to kill each other, the deadly situation puts some much-needed excitement back into their stale relationship. Comedy adventure, starring Brad Pitt, Angelina Jolie, Vince Vaughn and Adam Brody(n)

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Ted and Barney receive an ego boost after getting into a fight at MacLaren's - but when the losers try to sue them, they are forced to admit the embarrassing truth about what really happened. Starring Josh Radnor and Alyson Hannigan(n)

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: While Marshall and Robin feel homesick during Christmas in New York, Ted's apparently immature younger sister Heather arrives in the city, and he tries to keep her and Barney apart, fearing they will sleep together. Starring Josh Radnor and Alyson Hannigan(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Bonnie and Danny take a cookery class run by a noted chef, but when Danny wins the chance to be a guest sous chef, Bonnie is determined to prove that she's the better cook. Tucker advises Riley to make up a fake boyfriend in order to fix her friendship with Danny(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben and Riley play a game of 'shot and score', where they compete to see who can kiss a stranger first. Riley sets her sights on a handsome bar patron, while Ben hits it off with another customer. However, when Riley is horrified when her one-night stand turns out to be her new boss. Bonnie uses Riley's office for her real estate business, and Danny makes a big investment in his future(n)

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: Mike encourages his mother to get a job, completely unaware that urging her to find employment might cause drama for Molly. Comedy, starring Billy Gardell(n)

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: Mike succumbs to his weakness and cheats on his diet, but tries to hide his indulgence from Molly as Thanksgiving approaches. Comedy, starring Melissa McCarthy and Billy Gardell(n)

programme.desc: Sheldon falls ill, and his friends decide to go to a Planet of the Apes movie marathon to keep their distance, knowing he will be in a terrible mood. However, an unsuspecting Penny offers to nurse him. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Simon Helberg and Kaley Cuoco(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon feels threatened by a 15-year-old physics prodigy who is even cleverer than he is, and asks Leonard to help him discredit the precocious teenager's research. Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons star(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: After Barry starts checking out the best medical schools, Lainey reveals she has won a scholarship to art college. Erica and Adam start to suspect that Murray loves the family dog Lucky more than them(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry plans big romantic gestures for Lainey on high school prom night, while Erica and Geoff try to attend the event together, but things don't go as planned. Adam is thrilled when a nerdy but cute girl asks him out, but is horrified when Beverly gets involved(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When an Internal Affairs investigator reveals there may be a mole in the precinct, Peralta and Holt must find out who it is before Deputy Chief Wuntch gets wind of the situation. Jeffords and Diaz visit a silent disco to uncover leads for their new drug task force(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta hits it off with Sophia, a woman he meets in a bar, only to find out she is the defence attorney representing a perpetrator he is trying to put behind bars. programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard tries to use his wedding as an excuse to avoid being sent into space, but ends up accepting the mission. Amy plots to get Sheldon to take the next step in their relationship, while Leonard accidentally asks Penny to marry him(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: While looking for a new bar manager, Ben interviews his old crush Sam, and decides to exact 'Ben-geance' on her for never noticing him in high school. But once Ben sees Sam again, his plan to make her believe she got the job and then take it from her unravels. Bonnie realises marrying Brad means he's always going to be around, causing her to reconsider their union(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Thinking Tucker needs to stand up for himself with his boss Mary Hart, Ben films Mary berating Tucker to show how badly he's being treated, but when Emma accidentally uploads the video online, Mary and Tucker become a viral sensation - leaving Tucker in an even worse spot than before. Riley asks Danny to stand up to Bonnie and tell her she can't always hang out with them, but Bonnie has a trick up her sleeve to outwit Riley(n)

programme.desc: The bride-to-be is shocked when she cannot fit into her wedding dress just three weeks before the big day. Comedy, starring Melissa McCarthy and Billy Gardell(n)

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: Two days before their wedding, Mike and Molly participate in a rehearsal - but it ends in disaster. Comedy, starring Billy Gardell and Melissa McCarthy(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly decides to reinvent herself by going to night school so that she can quit her substitute teacher role and own her own business, but Murray dislikes change and tries to convince her to take a different path. Meanwhile, Barry embarks on a makeover of his own, and Erica struggles to balance her academic studies with her social life in college and calls on Adam for assistance(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam and Jackie fall out over which Halloween costumes to wear, so Murray teaches Adam to agree mindlessly with everything his girlfriend says just to keep her happy. However, Murray's strategy soon backfires, causing issues in his relationship with Beverly. Meanwhile, as Lainey visits Erica at college, Barry aims to get back together with her(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Though still heartbroken over Sophia, Jake's spirits are lifted when the squad is invited to a Homeland Security counter-terrorism training simulation. Gina performs a psychological test on Holt, while Santiago and Diaz compete for a day off(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When Peralta notices Holt is in a bad mood, he teams up with the captain's husband Kevin to find out what has gone wrong. Boyle tries to get a confession out of an elderly bank-robbery suspect (played by Happy Days creator Garry Marshall), who pretends to be frail and adorable whenever Santiago and Diaz are around(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends try to solve the mystery of Sheldon's post-lunch activities, following him to a secret room where they discover how he chills out. Elsewhere, Leonard is jealous when Penny starts texting a classmate, but things quickly change when Alex gets flirty with him(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon feels undermined when his parking space at the university is allocated to Howard instead, and his determination to cling on to the spot causes a rift in the pair's friendship. However, the battle between the boys pales in comparison to that waged by Amy and Bernadette, whose disagreement on behalf of their significant others becomes increasingly personal. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Simon Helberg(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Mercedes is panicked when someone puts a funeral wreath on her door. Elsewhere, Celeste is worried by Toby's plan to reveal his true identity(n)

programme.desc: Groom-to-be Harry wants a wedding fit for royalty, but his partner Charlotte is not into airs and graces and is dreaming of something much more low key(n)

programme.desc: Joshua Ritchie, Malique Thompson-Dwyer and James Lock go speed dating, while Amy Childs and Liv Bentley double date with Jamie and Dom(n)

programme.desc: A man who has had over a thousand partners and rarely uses condoms comes in for an STI test, and a woman needs a new contraceptive implant fitted inside her arm(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard tries to use his wedding as an excuse to avoid being sent into space, but ends up accepting the mission. Amy plots to get Sheldon to take the next step in their relationship, while Leonard accidentally asks Penny to marry him(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Part one of two. Peralta and Diaz adjust to life behind bars, but while Jake is forced to join a prison gang led by notorious inmate Romero, Rosa puts Captain Holt and Sgt Jeffords to the test by making outrageous lists of chores for her(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Part two of two. When the warden tells Peralta to investigate Romero's drug smuggling operation, Peralta finds himself trapped by divided loyalties. Meanwhile, Santiago is offered a deal by a local mobster who claims he can prove Lt Hawkins is guilty of the crimes that Diaz and Peralta were jailed for, but Holt and the team think they have found a safer plan. Tim Meadows, Lou Diamond Phillips and Gina Gershon guest star(n)

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty heads to South Africa on the trail of sweet piquante peppers and discovers a curious case that allow companies to effectively own a fruit or vegetable, while Kate Quilton looks into Britain's plastic crisis and discovers one type of very common food packaging that can't be recycled. Matt Tebbutt is in Germany to investigate a new type of yoghurt that claims to be full of fibre, but doesn't have any bits in it(n)

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Treasures
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp learns how to make damson jam, as expert Victoria Cranfield leads her through the task of removing every stone by hand(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Kent retirees David and Donna Bradley want to relocate permanently to Menorca, so Laura Hamilton shows them five properties for their £300,000 budget(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Jonnie Irwin helps husband and wife George and Lennox Thomas find their ideal holiday home in and around the Spanish area of Marina Almeria to escape their busy London lives(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien head to Nantwich and Stoke-on-Trent, where Henry comes across a 1960s moped, and Simon restores an early Mirror Dinghy(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole restores a petrol pump and turns a hubcap into a clock, and Simon O'Brien repurposes a copper immersion heater into a stylish wash basin(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick and Angel as they host a very special wedding for close friends. Motorcycle-mad Essex couple Martin and Kim start their search to buy the perfect chateau but can't see eye to eye. Cash-strapped Tim and Rebecca call in their mates to help with restoration work. Fiona puts her B&B plans on hold as she races against time to prepare for her first wedding. With the reception set to be outside she needs to fix 40 windows on the ageing chateau facade(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at Ye Olde Fighting Cocks in Arnside, Cumbria, where owners Tony Keates and Jeanette Hamer hope to prove that their establishment offers the best value for money. However, while the B&B's guests are bowled over by the spectacular views, they are less than impressed by Tony's tales of business success and a mouldy mattress(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition moves to Hadleigh, Suffolk, where Dr Stephen Stanley-Little invites fellow B&B owners to come and stay at his tranquil country setting - Westward Cottage. He takes his guests on a historic village tour that leaves one couple plotting their escape, while the host's relaxed approach to breakfast drives some of the others mad(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Third to host are bohemian couple Avril Berry and Alan Fraser of Roulotte Retreat in Melrose in the Scottish Borders. Their unique gypsy caravans are not to everyone's liking, and a yoga class fails to calm the tensions that seem to be rising within the group(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to the Elgin Hotel, Blackpool, where manager Garry Lloyd and his daughter Sophie Seddon want to demonstrate how their 89-room business can still deliver a personal touch. The hosts arrange an afternoon of tap-dancing lessons, ending with a surprise performance at the iconic Grand Theatre, but a breakfast mix-up the following morning puts some of the guests nonplussed(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants featured throughout the week reunite to revisit the highs and lows of their various stays, and as the B&B owners confront their critics face to face, they discover what the rival parties really thought of the quality of service they encountered. After the deliberations are over, the winning guest house is announced(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Flamingo chick Marley faces a tough childhood when mother Calypso loses interest in her duties - leaving dad Rum to do the work of two parents. The keepers are concerned when a newborn onager foal takes a turn for the worse, and a Sulawesi macaque monkey Rumple gives birth to a baby called Rey, only for the baby to get bullied by some of the higher-ranking females(n)

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend head to Eastbourne on the south coast to restore a 1962 Mini Cooper. This particular model is the property of farmer Keith, who has raced and rallied cars for most of his life, until being struck down with serious heart problems. Although his racing days are now over, Keith cannot let go of his beloved Mini, even though it has been rotting away in a shed for years(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Couple Martin and Kim continue their search for a dream chateau, and the clock is ticking for Fiona as she has just 24 hours to prepare for her first-ever wedding(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows the progress of a dual-purpose family and wheelchair-friendly home built by design engineer and former Paralympic swimmer, Mark Butler. Mark was paralysed from the waist down following a motorcycle accident and the home he currently lives in with his family makes it virtually impossible for him to complete even the simplest of tasks around the house. He and his wife Penny want to build a cutting-edge family home, with a drive-in basement, passenger lift and accessible kitchen and bathroom. However, building such a unique property proves a huge challenge, and the strain on Mark and Penny becomes almost unbearable(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The return of the documentary about life inside an A&E department, following patients treated in the same 24-hour period at St George's in south-west London. Fourteen-year-old Eduard is rushed in after falling from a swing and fracturing his ankle, while 62-year-old Rosina is treated having broken her wrist on the dancefloor at a family party. Paula is in Resus having been unable to take in food through her feeding tube and it is not only her health that is in danger, but also that of her unborn baby(n)

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: Documentary focusing on Wiltshire's police, paramedics and fire services. Cases include a man with an axe-related injury, while another team respond to a Saturday afternoon call-out to help the victim of an injury incurred while playing rugby. And at a road traffic incident, a woman has to be cut out of her car and faces life-changing multiple injuries(n)

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: In Birmingham, paramedics Paul Johnson and Maddie Murray are called out in the early hours of the morning to a 60-year-old patient with severe chest pains(n)

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy panel show's version of the words-and numbers-quiz, inviting Sean Lock and Miles Jupp to take on guest captain Alan Carr and Roisin Conaty. Ivan Brackenbury - aka Tom Binns - joins wordsmith Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while maths whizz Rachel Riley looks after the numbers(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The return of the documentary about life inside an A&E department, following patients treated in the same 24-hour period at St George's in south-west London. Paula is in Resus having been unable to take in food through her feeding tube and it is not only her health that is in danger, but also that of her unborn baby(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Boston to help change the fortunes of a failing Italian restaurant run by two brothers. The eatery's decline began when one of the pair started embezzling money to fund his prescription drug addiction, and things only got worse when the he was sentenced to four years in prison. With the time now served, he has returned, but must first regain his brother's trust before he can save their business(n)

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty finds out about a threat to British juniper berries that could spell the end of gin's recent resurgence, while Kate Quilton heads to Hawaii to find out why macadamia nuts are not sold in their shells. Matt Tebbutt investigates the possible health risks caused by his habit of going back for a second dip in a communal salsa with a tortilla chip that's already been in his mouth(n)

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Treasures
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp visits the Nidderdale agricultural show in the Yorkshire Dales, where she learns how to make her own pork pies and sausages. However, her success jeopardised by problems the evening before the event(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Radio broadcaster Toby Anstis loves Ibiza and having enjoyed many holidays there for 20 years now wants to buy his own bolthole. With help from his twin sister Kate, and with a budget of £250,000, he asks Laura Hamilton to show him the best property the island has to offer(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Scarlette Douglas helps Martyn and Anne Golesworthy find a holiday home on the Greek island of Naxos, which holds a special place in their hearts as the place they got married(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien visit a Yorkshire textile mill, where Simon repurposes a mill trolley into a coffee table and Henry struggles to repair a Soviet-era motorbike(n)

programme.desc: Couple Martin and Kim continue their search for a dream chateau, and the clock is ticking for Fiona as she has just 24 hours to prepare for her first-ever wedding(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed

John reveals his hidden talents at dinner, but his performance at breakfast the next morning does not go down well with all of the fellow B&B owners(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: In York, part-time panto dame Graham Smith runs the Georgian House & Mews, and takes his guests back in time with a Nordic test of strength. programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Two of the young Asian elephants contract the herpes virus, leaving the keepers doing everything they can to save the animals' lives, using anti-viral medication and a pioneering blood transfusion. When silvery gibbon Tilu gives birth, dad Alven has to keep their older son, tearaway Eko, in check. The keepers wonder why jaguars Napo and Goshi have not mated after six years together, and a new species of cricket arrives at the insect house(n)

Plus, musician Seasick Steve is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car(n)

programme.title: Cop Car Workshop
programme.desc: Inspector Dave Corcoran calls on his friend to turn what looks like a tug boat into a police vessel. Meanwhile, the team fix up a car whose tyres were slashed whilst on duty(n)

programme.title: Scrapyard Supercar
programme.desc: Engineer Ralph Hosier leads two teams of car buffs in an engineering contest against pro-driver Shane Lynch's supercar. This time, they take on the iconic Land Rover Discovery in an off-road hill climb. To defeat such a thoroughbred, the teams need to demonstrate their innovation and imagination(n)

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson and James May head to New Zealand to take part in a race along the coastline to the tip of the North Island - with one behind the wheel of a car and the other in an America's Cup yacht. Back in the UK, Richard Hammond tries out three hot hatches as he puts the Renaultsport Clio 200, Peugeot 208 GTi and Ford Fiesta ST through their paces, and a host of stars including Warwick Davis, Charles Dance and Joss Stone assemble at the test track to welcome a new Reasonably Priced Car(n)

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson gets behind the wheel of the Ferrari F12 Berlinetta, sampling the punch of its 730bhp V12 engine on the open roads of Scotland. Richard Hammond harnesses the power of motorsport on a quest to find the world's best taxi, and James May pays tribute to the former BBC Television Centre in White City, London, using a motorcyclist and a pair of parkour runners. Plus, the BAC Mono - an astonishingly fast car with just one seat - is put through its paces on the test track, and film director Ron Howard goes for a spin in the new Reasonably Priced Car(n)

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Phil Wang makes sure his outstanding outfit leaves even less to the imagination than it did before and Jessica Knappett demonstrates her mastery of a child's percussion instrument(n)

programme.title: Room 101
programme.desc: Frank Skinner invites comedian and actor Rob Delaney, presenter Davina McCall and actor and musician Laurence Fox to express their anger over individuals, events and objects that upset them, hoping to see them consigned to oblivion. Their gripes include people who order starters, 12-string guitars and cyclists wearing Lycra(n)

programme.title: Room 101

Their gripes include magicians, losing one's keys and life itself(n)

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: It was 30 years after the Romans invaded Britain that they were ready to take on the challenge of conquering the Lake District. With the toughest landscape they had encountered in the nation, peopled by a rebellious tribe, it was no small task, but within a few years, the whole of Lakeland was under their control. Tony Robinson tackles the journey by himself, walking 50 miles from Penrith to Ambleside and on to the Irish Sea at Ravenglass, discovering that the Romans encountered beauty and danger in equal measure(n)

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson takes a four-day trek along the coastline between Plymouth in Devon and Falmouth, learning about the thriving smuggling trade in Cornwall during the late 18th century. The area's tiny secretive harbours, beaches and secluded coves were ideal for illicit imports such as tobacco and brandy, and the business was so huge it threatened the national economy. Along his route, visiting such beauty spots as Lantic Bay and Polperro, he encounters all sorts of reminders of the trade and meets descendants of those involved(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

Unfortunately for them, other residents were enraged by the noise, smell and mess and wasted no time in contacting the authorities. In a cul-de-sac in Leicestershire, the Pollard, Walne and Elliott families have been harassed by 68-year-old Leslie Collins for more than a decade after they complained about the noise from an illegal wood-waste business he was running from his home. Former Big Brother contestant Aisleyne Horgan-Wallace has been left with slanting dentures after dental surgery to improve her broken teeth. Can surgeon Adam Slade give her back her smile? programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A furious landlord discovers his tenant has been subletting his exclusive north-west London flat - having not paid any rent for months. programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

Plus, the story of a pub owner in Lincolnshire trying to evict his tenant, having rented it 10 years ago on a 'gentleman's handshake'. Now, however, he is owed a staggering £40,000 in unpaid rent(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords

In Worcestershire, Gareth and Craig try to recover £45,000 from a young online entrepreneur, who claims no responsibility for the debt he owes to his courier. Their target cooks up a flimsy lie in an effort to absolve himself, but dishonesty proves to be the least of the agents' worries when they discover a stash of guns at the back of the garage. In east London, an Indian restaurant owner begins to take his financial responsibilities seriously when Del and Dael start removing cookers and freezers from his premises, and a pair of pensioners in Oxfordshire hope the High Court will provide them a lifeline as they try to pay off a £4,000 bill to a solicitors' firm after a failed compensation claim(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The enforcement officers visit a former professional footballer who owes £4,500 in unpaid legal fees, and in London the officers chase up a £4,000 debt owed by a car dealer. programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The officers chase a debt of almost £2,000 in unpaid parking fines, and later encounter the extraordinary case of a debt of £80,000 owed by a hotel owner to his ex-girlfriend. programme.desc: A prisoner requests Hawkes' presence at his execution, and makes a confession that shocks the forensic scientist. programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Green and Cassady investigate the fatal shooting of female rapper Clarice James. The clues initially lead them to a shady music producer, but suspicion later falls on a jeweller who claims the victim owed him a large sum of money. Police drama, starring Milena Govich and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.desc: Jerry Orbach's final appearance in the crime drama. programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An Iraqi immigrant kills a female veteran of the second Gulf War for torturing her brother at Abu Ghraib prison. However, the detectives learn the accused's lawyer plans to defend his client as an enemy combatant, immune from prosecution under the terms of the Geneva Convention, and that they may have no jurisdiction over the case. Starring Jesse L Martin and Dennis Farina(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A politician is embroiled in a triple murder, but persuading him to reveal the truth is only the first step toward unmasking a killer willing to go to any lengths to avoid capture. Crime drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.desc: An investigation into a hit-and-run leads to a property scam, but Green, Rubirosa and Lupo's undercover work takes a surprising twist that pits McCoy against the US Attorney's office. January Jones (Mad Men) guest stars(n)

programme.desc: Detectives Fontana and Green investigate the murders of a group of heroin users in a raid on a drug den. Drama, starring Dennis Farina, Jesse L Martin, Sam Waterston and Elisabeth Rohm(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A convicted child murderer is struck and left for dead by a motorist just weeks after his prison release, but Fontana and Green are initially unenthusiastic about finding out who ran him over. It is not until the killer dies from his injuries that they investigate inside the prison where he served his sentence - and uncover evidence that leads McCoy to make a startling discovery. Starring Dennis Farina(n)

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: A gruesome copycat murder on a street car reopens a former case for Wade, evoking painful memories from her past(n)

programme.desc: Logan pledges to discover who administered a lethal dose of radioactive polonium to a dying friend, but later learns Ross is being pressured to drop the case. Drama, starring Christopher Noth and Eric Bogosian(n)

programme.desc: Racial tensions begin to boil over after an unarmed black man is shot by police from another precinct, and three officers are put on trial(n)

programme.desc: The SVU team is called to investigate when a famous violinist staying at a four-star hotel reports being raped by her colleague. However, on pursuing the accusation, the man in question claims to have no memory of the incident, but reveals he was recently drugged and robbed by a hired escort girl. Meanwhile, Rollins' mother Beth throws her a baby shower, and the event co-incides with the re-emergence of the detective's fugitive sister Kim. Crime drama, guest starring Virginia Madsen and Lindsay Pulsipher(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team investigates when the wife of a popular writer is accused of spousal abuse after fighting with her stepdaughters. Hard-hitting drama, starring Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Carisi's future brother-in-law accuses his female parole officer of rape, forcing the detective to investigate whether his sister's fiance is telling the truth or allowing his old habits to resurface. Drama, starring Peter Scanavino and Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Los Angeles
programme.desc: When a mass shooting occurs at a primarily Hispanic mortgage office, Winters and Jaruszalski begin begin investigating the surviving employees, in addition to their clients. When the case finally reaches court after a potential suspect is arrested, DDAs Dekker and Stanton confront the defendant's lawyer who claims that the team has allowed racial factors to influence its investigation. Crime drama, starring Corey Stoll(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Los Angeles
programme.desc: A serial murder at a birthday party leads the detectives to the pornography underworld. Crime drama, starring Corey Stoll and Alfred Molina(n)

programme.desc: A murderer wages a cyber war on healthcare workers he holds a grudge against. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise and Anna Belknap, with Greg Germann (Ally McBeal)(n)

programme.desc: The body of a pregnant Nigerian woman is found dumped in an alley. Laura and Jake investigate her death, and find a tattoo on her body that identifies her as a drug mule for an international smuggling ring. Pursuing the syndicate, they discover another African woman being held hostage and an illegal maternity ward(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A Russian immigrant dies of ricin poisoning and the detectives' inquiries link him and his brother to a prostitution ring trafficking young women into New York. A police officer whose daughter was among the girls is the main suspect, but Green and Cassady face difficulties with the Russian consulate(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the abduction and murder of a child, following a lead to a suspected serial paedophile, who is found holding another boy captive. However, the youngster seems to be more than just an innocent victim. Crime drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A woman is accused of murdering her husband's mistress. Although the crime is found to be premeditated, the defendant's lawyer claims his client's actions were prompted by post-traumatic stress syndrome arising from the September 11 terrorist attack. Starring Dennis Farina(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A recently paroled prison gang member is shot dead, and suspicion falls on former crime associates - until his battle behind bars with a corrections officer comes to light. McCoy then learns the defence attorney will claim his client took action to ward off a threat by the con and his 'brotherhood'. Guest starring Candice Bergen(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A riot at an immigration rally in Central Park ends in murder, and the political climate forces McCoy to assign a special prosecutor, who starts to increase tensions in the office with his anti-establishment attitude. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A case of mistaken identity leads Green and Lupo to suspect an innocent doctor has been murdered in place of a killer's true target, a physician who administered a botched lethal injection in South Carolina. Police drama, starring Jesse L Martin and Jeremy Sisto(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A wealthy man is found beaten to death in his home, prompting detectives Fontana and Green to suspect the victim's wife and the contractor who installed the security system. McCoy and Southerlyn investigate an affair between the two, and seek to turn them against each other, but a second unexpected crime slows down their case(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A rap producer is found shot dead in his studio and suspicion falls on one of his proteges, a hip-hop artist whose lyrics describe a similar killing. programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: A military attorney asks the team to investigate the disappearance of a lawyer who specialises in classified cases, a mystery that leads them to a private military academy(n)

programme.title: The Enemy Within
programme.desc: When contractors working for the CIA are murdered, Keaton and the team discover the CIA is keeping secrets from the FBI regarding Tal(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The Bakers, the stars of America's top reality TV show, are rocked by scandal when 13-year-old daughter Lane is discovered to be three months pregnant. Ultra-conservative parents Pam and Frank resist SVU involvement in a misguided attempt to shield their 10 children - and their lucrative TV empire - from disgrace. However, when Lane accuses one of the show's cameramen of raping her, one who happens to have already had a vasectomy, it becomes clear the Bakers are trying to protect someone. Unable to aid in the inquiry due to her own pregnancy, Rollins decides to make good use of her time away from the beat to binge-watch the Bakers' show in an effort to identify potential suspects. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hartigay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The hunt for a missing teenage girl takes an emotional toll on Sgt Dodds, and DNA evidence becomes the crucial link the team needs to identify the youngster's abductor. Hard-hitting and emotional series chronicling the life and crimes of the New York Police Department, starring Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A former footballer is caught abusing his ex-girlfriend in leaked surveillance camera footage, and Fin and Benson investigate the couple's history. The pair - sportscaster AJ Martin and partner Paula - struggle to keep their family and relationship intact in the wake of the video's appearance(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Silk
programme.desc: Martha reluctantly agrees to accept a high-profile prosecution case, in which a schoolteacher has been accused of the attempted murder of a pupil. Pitted against a low-level barrister from her own chambers, she refuses to accept an easy victory, and gives her opponent tips on how to defend his client. However, her actions incur the fury of the Crown Prosecution Service. Meanwhile, Clive faces a Silk interview with a retired judge - who just happens to be Niamh's father(n)

programme.title: A Thousand Kisses Deep (2011)
programme.desc: A troubled woman investigates a strange suicide, only to find a means to travel back in time. Sci-fi drama, starring Jodie Whittaker, Dougray Scott, Emilia Fox and David Warner(n)

programme.desc: Jamie Oliver takes over the kitchen of Kidbrooke School in Greenwich, hoping to re-educate the junk food-loving children by introducing a healthy diet to improve concentration and eliminate long-term problems of obesity and heart disease. He joins forces with dinner lady Nora in his Feed Me Better campaign, aiming to promote nutritious dishes throughout the capital's schools before encouraging the rest of the country to follow suit(n)

programme.title: Victim (1961)
programme.desc: A secretly gay barrister discovers his lover has been driven to suicide by blackmailers, who have also extorted money from several other men. Risking his reputation and marriage, he hunts down the culprits, fully aware that it could lead to his own exposure as a homosexual, illegal at the time. Drama, starring Dirk Bogarde, Sylvia Syms, Dennis Price and Anthony Nicholls(n)

programme.title: The One That Got Away (1957)
programme.desc: Fact-based Second World War adventure about a German pilot who repeatedly escaped from British prison camps. Transferred to Montreal, he managed to break out and cross the border into America in a bid to rejoin his squadron. Starring Hardy Kruger, Michael Goodliffe, Colin Gordon and Terence Alexander(n)

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Research suggests the connections in men's and women's brains follow different patterns, which might explain typical forms of gender-specific behaviour. Dr Michael Mosley and Professor Alice Roberts investigate whether these are innate or are shaped by the outside world, using a team of human guinea pigs and a troop of Barbary apes to test the science and challenge old stereotypes. They ask whether this new scientific research will benefit both sexes or drive them even further apart(n)

programme.title: Ultimate Force
programme.desc: Armed Checkrein terrorists break into a pharmaceutical plant, taking hostages when the alarm is raised and the unit sealed off. Caroline volunteers to enter the premises and treat one of the employees after MI5 reveals the plant is working on a vaccine for a potent anthrax mutation. As time runs out, Red Troop is faced with a dilemma on which the lives of colleagues - and thousands of innocent civilians - depend. Ross Kemp and Alex Reid star(n)

programme.title: Decoding Annie Parker (2013)
programme.desc: A woman is devastated to be diagnosed with the same cancer that killed her mother, and as she battles the illness, her relationship with her husband suffers. Meanwhile, a geneticist makes a breakthrough when she discovers the gene mutation that proves breast cancer can be hereditary. Fact-based drama, starring Samantha Morton and Helen Hunt(n)

programme.title: Kicking Off (2015)
programme.desc: Two football fans are elated when their beloved team scores the winning goal that will save them from relegation - only for the triumph to be crushed when the referee disallows it.
